lateos.description: Lateos AI Personal Agent - Secure email, calendar, and task management

setup: 2. Copy the IdToken from the response
3. Replace YOUR_COGNITO_ID_TOKEN_HERE with the actual token
4. Token expires after 1 hour - re-authenticate as needed
security_notes: ✅ All communication over HTTPS with API Gateway
✅ Per-user data isolation via DynamoDB partition keys
✅ All actions audited to lateos-prod-audit-logs table
✅ No shell execution, no wildcard permissions
✅ Secrets in AWS Secrets Manager (not in code)
✅ KMS encryption at rest for all DynamoDB tables

example_usage.description: Once configured in Claude Desktop, you can use:
prompts: Show me action items from my recent emails
Give me a detailed summary of emails from alice@example.com
What emails have I received in the last 6 hours?
